ValidationRule.description: The case cannot be closed if the Case Outcome is not populated for Service Complaints.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( (ISPICKVAL( Status , 'L1 Closed') || ISPICKVAL( Status , 'L2 Closed')) && ISBLANK(Case_Outcome__c) && ISPICKVAL(Case_Sub_Type__c, 'Service Complaints'), TRUE, FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The case cannot be closed if the Case Outcome is not populated for Service Complaints.
